markets.question: HYPE Up or Down - March 13, 2AM ET
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the HYPE/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the HYPE/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/futures/HYPEUSDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance HYPE/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

markets.question: Solana Up or Down - March 12, 1:55AM-2:00AM ET
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Solana price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the SOL/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/sol-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream SOL/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

markets.question: 1H Spread: Hornets (-7.5)
markets.description:
In the first half of the NBA game between Hornets and Kings, scheduled for March 11 at 10:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Hornets" if the Hornets are winning by 8 or more points at halftime.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Kings".

The result will be determined based on the score at halftime only.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Hornets vs. Kings
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 11 at 10:00PM ET:
If the Hornets win, the market will resolve to "Hornets".
If the Kings win, the market will resolve to "Kings".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

markets.question: Brandon Miller: Points O/U 21.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 11 at 10:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Brandon Miller scores more than 21.5 points during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if Brandon Miller scores 21.5 points or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.
